meta.title: AWSoversea | Global Logistics Beyond Borders
meta.description: International logistics and freight forwarding company providing Air Freight, Sea Freight, Customs Clearance, Warehousing, Import & Export Services, and Door-to-Door Cargo Solutions worldwide.

hero.title: Global Logistics Beyond Borders
hero.subtitle: Fast, secure, and reliable international logistics solutions connecting businesses and individuals across the world. From air freight to sea freight, we deliver with confidence.

trustedPartners.title: Trusted by Businesses Worldwide
trustedPartners.description: Helping importers, exporters, manufacturers, traders, and eCommerce businesses manage international logistics efficiently.

about.title: Your Trusted Global Logistics Partner
about.description: AWSoversea provides complete freight forwarding and logistics solutions including Air Freight, Sea Freight, Import & Export Services, Customs Clearance, Warehousing, FCL, LCL, and Door-to-Door Delivery. Our mission is to simplify global shipping with transparent processes, competitive pricing, and dedicated customer support.

services.title: Our Logistics Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive logistics solutions tailored for businesses of every size.

items.title: Air Freight
items.description: Fast international cargo transportation with reliable global airline partners.

items.title: Sea Freight
items.description: Affordable FCL and LCL shipping for commercial and bulk cargo.

items.title: Import Services
items.description: End-to-end import management with customs assistance.

items.title: Export Services
items.description: Professional export documentation and worldwide shipping.

items.title: Customs Clearance
items.description: Smooth customs processing with regulatory compliance.

items.title: Warehousing
items.description: Secure storage, inventory handling, and distribution solutions.

items.title: Global Network
items.description: Strong international logistics network across multiple countries.

items.title: Transparent Pricing
items.description: Competitive pricing with no hidden charges.

items.title: Secure Shipping
items.description: Every shipment is handled with maximum care and security.

items.title: Experienced Team
items.description: Professional logistics experts with industry knowledge.

items.title: Real-Time Tracking
items.description: Monitor shipment progress anytime using our mobile app.

items.title: 24/7 Support
items.description: Dedicated customer assistance whenever you need us.

steps.title: Confirm Booking
steps.description: Approve the quotation and schedule pickup.

steps.title: Shipment in Transit
steps.description: We handle transportation and customs clearance.

steps.title: Delivered Successfully
steps.description: Track your shipment until it reaches its destination.

mobileApp.title: Manage Everything From Our Mobile App
mobileApp.description: Book shipments, track cargo, upload documents, receive notifications, manage payments, and access shipment history directly from your smartphone.

tracking.title: Track Your Shipment
tracking.description: Enter your tracking number to check the latest shipment status.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.description: Businesses worldwide trust AWSoversea for reliable international logistics solutions.

coverage.title: Worldwide Shipping Coverage
coverage.description: Connecting businesses across Asia, Europe, North America, South America, Africa, and the Middle East with dependable freight solutions.

products.title: Products We Export
products.description: Browse a preview of what's moving through our export desk — send an enquiry on anything you don't see listed.

blogs.title: Latest Logistics Insights
blogs.description: Stay updated with shipping regulations, logistics trends, import-export guides, and industry news.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about international shipping, customs, and freight forwarding.

downloadApp.title: Download the AWSoversea Mobile App
downloadApp.description: Manage your shipments anytime, anywhere. Book cargo, track deliveries, upload documents, receive instant notifications, and stay connected throughout the shipping journey.
